description_long: This object is a hand axe featuring a robust, rectangular black metal head and a natural wooden handle. The handle is slightly curved, providing ergonomic grip and control, and is made from light-colored wood with visible grain patterns. The axe head is solid and blocky, with a flat poll on one end and a sharp, straight cutting edge on the other, suitable for splitting or chopping tasks. The head is securely mounted onto the handle, with the wood extending through the eye of the blade and wedged in place. There are no visible decorative elements or branding on the axe, giving it a utilitarian appearance. The overall design is practical and typical for use in urban maintenance, gardening, or emergency scenarios.
description: A sturdy hand axe with a black metal head and a curved wooden handle, designed for chopping or splitting tasks. The design is utilitarian and practical, with no visible branding or decoration.
description_view_0: Front view showing the broad black axe head and the full length of the curved wooden handle.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the thickness of the axe head and the gentle curve of the handle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the poll of the axe head and the end of the handle, with the mounting clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the straight cutting edge and the overall slimness of the axe.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle, ergonomic, oval cross-section, smooth finish, no additional grip features.
attribute_blade_design: Rectangular black steel head with a straight cutting edge and flat poll, single-edged, no beard or decorative features.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the handle passing through the eye of the blade.
